Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class AuthProvider

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.AuthProvider
public class AuthProvider extends Metadata

Java class for AuthProvider complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AuthProvider">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="appleTeam" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authorizeUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="consumerKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="consumerSecret" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="controlPlane" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MuleSoftControlPlane" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="customMetadataTypeRecord" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultScopes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ecKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="errorUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="executionUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="friendlyName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="iconUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="idTokenIssuer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="includeOrgIdInIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="linkKickoffUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="logoutUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="oauthKickoffUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="plugin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="portal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="providerType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AuthProviderType"/>
         <element name="registrationHandler" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="requireMfa" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sendAccessTokenInHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sendClientCredentialsInHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sendSecretInApis" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ssoKickoffUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="tokenUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userInfoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
